Installation¶

Installing with pip¶

The package hasn’t been uploaded to PYPI yet¶
pip install biofunc

Cloning from GitHub¶

# clone the repository
git clone https://github.com/MycoG/biofunc.git
# install with pip
pip install .

Testing¶

# clone the repository
git clone https://github.com/MycoG/biofunc.git

# install dev dependencies
pip install ".[dev]"

# run pytest - tests are in "./test" directory
pytest
